What is EcoTwin?: EcoTwin is a digital twin technology platform that bridges the physical and digital divide for process intelligence.
What problem does EcoTwin solve for MSME: EcoTwin solves the lack of affordable, rapid-deployment process diagnostics for MSMEs, eliminating prolonged integration times and high CapEx costs.
What industries does EcoTwin target?: EcoTwin primarily targets precision manufacturing, metal casting, molding, discrete manufacturing, and smart infrastructure.
What is the EcoTwin business model?: EcoTwin relies on subscription models (SaaS), hybrid edge-cloud licensing, and professional services consulting.
What technologies are used in the EcoTwi: The platform utilizes IoT sensors, edge computing frameworks, large language models for querying, and real-time dashboard analytics.
